page.title: Category:All articles with topics of unclear notability

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 15 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8235724)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Backlog|50000}}
{{CatTrack}}
{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}}
{{tl|Notability}}
{{filter category by topic}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}}}'''}}}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235724}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:All articles with topics of unclear notability]]
[[en:Category:All articles with topics of unclear notability]]
[[WP:Reliable sources|reliable sources]]
[[WP:Verify|verify]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTAll articles with topics of unclear notability]]
[[Category:Articles with topics of unclear notability]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_with_topics_of_unclear_notability here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25266157613|commit triggered pipeline]]
